# fallledger MCP

> MCP (stdio) server around fallledger-sdk · 8 tools + 3 resources for Claude Code · MIT · AI Native Solutions · MCP server for Claude/Cursor/Codex · MIT-licensed · Ed25519-signed · listed on FallMarket.

fallledger MCP is a sovereign tool built by the AI-Native Solutions guild. It runs on your machine, ships with source, and never phones home.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallledger-mcp/

## Category

MCP server for Claude/Cursor/Codex. Part of the FallMarket sovereign agent marketplace (https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/).

## Install

```
claude mcp add fallledger -- npx -y @ai-native-solutions/fallledger-mcp
```

## About AI-Native Solutions

AI-Native Solutions builds sovereign single-file AI tools, MCP servers, SDKs, and HTTP APIs. All work is MIT, all is Ed25519-signed, all is discoverable via FallMarket. This tool is one entry in a 766-listing catalog.
